evidence_summary: Rising search momentum for backpacks and hiking gear signals demand for full waterproof-breathable systems in the Alps. Evidence: Google Trends momentum=0.25, innovation=1.00 for 'backpack' signals sustained alpine gear interest (google_trends_global_momentum); YouTube video 'Don't buy a Waterproof Jacket for Hiking until you watch this!' highlights consumer education demand (youtube); Trend facets list gore-tex, dwr, waterproof as top features with breathable as co-feature
transferability: High — DACH alpine climate makes waterproof-breathable a core year-round need
recommended_action: Expand Gore-Tex shell and DWR-treated layer assortment; create layering system bundles
risks: Gore-Tex licensing costs; cheaper alternatives (eVent, Pertex) eroding premium positioning
products: hardshell jacket; waterproof trail pants; alpine backpack rain cover
competitor_gap: Peak Performance appears at competitors but not client — a key waterproof-breathable brand in gap list
